title: Make the PERFECT Videos with Claude Code (Full Workflow)
summary: Cole Medin shows a complete AI video generation pipeline powered by Claude Code that automates planning, coding, voice, visuals, music, and final production. The workflow integrates multiple tools including Archon, HyperFrames, and Neon to create polished videos from URLs or ideas with a single command.
